text.Rotherham: When I say of the righteous man He shall surely live but he hath trusted in his righteousness and committed perversity None of his righteous deeds shall be mentioned, But by his perversity which he hath committed—thereby, shall he die.
text.KJV: 33:13 When I shal say to the righteous, that he shall surely liue if he trust to his owne righteousnes and commit iniquitie, all his righteousnesses shall not be remembred; but for his iniquitie that he hath committed, he shall die for it.
text.NABRE: 33:13 Even though I say to the just that they shall surely live, if they, relying on their justice, do wrong, none of their just deeds shall be remembered; because of the wrong they have done, they shall die.

text.NRSV: Again, though I say to the wicked, “You shall surely die,” yet if they turn from their sin and do what is lawful and right—
text.Rotherham: And when I say to the lawless man Thou shalt surely die, but he shall turn from his sin, and do justice and righteousness:
text.KJV: 33:14 Againe, when I say vnto the wicked, Thou shalt surely die, if hee turne from his sinne, and do that which is lawfull and right;
text.NABRE: 33:14 And though I say to the wicked that they shall die, if they turn away from sin and do what is just and right—

text.NRSV: if the wicked restore the pledge, give back what they have taken by robbery, and walk in the statutes of life, committing no iniquity—they shall surely live, they shall not die.
text.Rotherham: The debt-pledge, the lawless man shall restore Plunder, shall pay back, In the statutes of life, hath walked, so as not to commit perversity. He shall surely live he shall not die:—
text.KJV: 33:15 If the wicked restore the pledge, giue againe that he had robbed, walke in the Statutes of life without committing iniquitie, hee shall surely liue, hee shall not die.
text.NABRE: 33:15 returning pledges, restoring stolen goods, walking by statutes that bring life, doing nothing wrong—they shall surely live; they shall not die.

text.NRSV: None of the sins that they have committed shall be remembered against them; they have done what is lawful and right, they shall surely live.
text.Rotherham: None of his sins which he hath committed shall be called to mind against him,— Justice and righteousness, hath he done He shall surely live.
text.KJV: 33:16 None of his sinnes that hee hath committed, shall be mentioned vnto him: he hath done that which is lawfull and right; he shall surely liue.
text.NABRE: 33:16 None of the sins they committed shall be remembered against them. If they do what is right and just, they shall surely live.

text.NRSV: Yet your people say, “The way of the Lord is not just,” when it is their own way that is not just.
text.Rotherham: And can the sons of thy people say, The way of The Lord will not be equal? Nay! but as for them, their way will not be equal!
text.KJV: 33:17 ¶ Yet the children of thy people say, The way of the Lord is not equall: but as for them, their way is not equall.
text.NABRE: 33:17 Your people say, “The way of the Lord is not fair!” But it is their way that is not fair.

text.NRSV: When the righteous turn from their righteousness and commit iniquity, they shall die for it.
text.Rotherham: When the righteous man shall turn from his righteousness and commit perversity Then shall he die for them;
text.KJV: 33:18 When the righteous turneth from his righteousnes, and committeth iniquitie, he shall euen die thereby.
text.NABRE: 33:18 When the just turn away from justice and do wrong, they shall die for it.

text.NRSV: And when the wicked turn from their wickedness and do what is lawful and right, they shall live by it.
text.Rotherham: But when the lawless man shall turn from his lawlessness, and do justice and righteousness Upon them, shall he live.
text.KJV: 33:19 But if the wicked turne from his wickednes, and doe that which is lawfull and right, he shall liue thereby.
text.NABRE: 33:19 When the wicked turn away from wickedness and do what is right and just, because of this they shall live.

text.NRSV: Yet you say, “The way of the Lord is not just.” O house of Israel, I will judge all of you according to your ways!
text.Rotherham: And can ye then say, The way of The Lord will not be equal? Every man—according to his own ways so will I judge you O house of Israel?
text.KJV: 33:20 ¶ Yet yee say, The way of the Lord is not equall, O yee house of Israel; I will iudge you euery one after his wayes.
text.NABRE: 33:20 But still you say, “The way of the Lord is not fair!” I will judge each of you according to your ways, house of Israel.

text.NRSV: In the twelfth year of our exile, in the tenth month, on the fifth day of the month, someone who had escaped from Jerusalem came to me and said, “The city has fallen.”
text.Rotherham: And it came to pass in the twelfth year, in the tenth month on the fifth of the month of our exile, that there came unto me one that had escaped out of Jerusalem saying. Smitten is the city!
text.KJV: 33:21 ¶ And it came to passe in the twelfth yeere of our captiuitie, in the tenth moneth, in the fifth day of the moneth, that one that had escaped out of Ierusalem, came vnto mee, saying, The city is smitten.
text.NABRE: 33:21 The Survivor from Jerusalem. On the fifth day of the tenth month, in the twelfth year of our exile, the survivor came to me from Jerusalem and said, “The city is taken!”

text.NRSV: Now the hand of the Lord had been upon me the evening before the fugitive came; but he had opened my mouth by the time the fugitive came to me in the morning; so my mouth was opened, and I was no longer unable to speak.
text.Rotherham: Now the hand of Yahweh, had come unto me in the evening, before the coming of him who had escaped, and he had opened my mouth, by the time that he came to me in the morning, —so my mouth, was opened, and I was dumb no longer.
text.KJV: 33:22 Now the hand of the Lord was vpon mee in the euening, afore hee that was escaped came, and had opened my mouth vntill hee came to mee in the morning, and my mouth was opened, and I was no more dumbe.
text.NABRE: 33:22 The hand of the Lord had come upon me the evening before the survivor arrived and opened my mouth when he reached me in the morning. My mouth was opened, and I was mute no longer. Those Left in Judah.

text.NRSV: The word of the Lord came to me:
text.Rotherham: Then came the word of Yahweh unto me saying:
text.KJV: 33:23 Then the word of the Lord came vnto me, saying,
text.NABRE: 33:23 The word of the Lord came to me:

text.NRSV: Mortal, the inhabitants of these waste places in the land of Israel are saying, “Abraham was only one man, yet he got possession of the land; but we are many; the land is surely given us to possess.”
text.Rotherham: Son of man These inhabitants of waste places on the soil of Israel are saying thus, One, was Abraham. Yet he inherited the land,- But, we, are many, To us, is the land given as an inheritance.
text.KJV: 33:24 Sonne of man, they that inhabite those wastes of the land of Israel, speake, saying, Abraham was one, and he inherited the land: but we are many, the land is giuen vs for inheritance.
text.NABRE: 33:24 Son of man, these who live among the ruins in the land of Israel are saying: “Abraham was only one person, yet he was given possession of the land. Since we are many, the land must be given to us as our possession.”

text.NRSV: Therefore say to them, Thus says the Lord God: You eat flesh with the blood, and lift up your eyes to your idols, and shed blood; shall you then possess the land?
text.Rotherham: Wherefore say unto them Thus, saith My Lord. Yahweh. -With the blood, ye do eat. And your eyes, ye do lift up unto your manufactured gods. And blood, ye do shed; And the land, shall ye inherit?
text.KJV: 33:25 Wherefore say vnto them, Thus saith the Lord God, Ye eate with the blood, and lift vp your eyes toward your idoles, and shed blood; and shal ye possesse the land?
text.NABRE: 33:25 Therefore say to them: Thus says the Lord God: You eat on the mountains, you raise your eyes to your idols, you shed blood—yet you would keep possession of the land?

text.NRSV: You rely on your sword, you commit abominations, and each of you defiles his neighbor’s wife; shall you then possess the land?
text.Rotherham: Ye men have taken your stand by your sword. Ye women have wrought abomination, And every man—with the wife of his neighbour, have ye defiled yourselves; And the land, shall ye inherit?
text.KJV: 33:26 Yee stand vpon your sword; yee worke abomination, and ye defile euery one his neighbours wife, and shall ye possesse the land?
text.NABRE: 33:26 You rely on your swords, you commit abominations, each defiles his neighbor’s wife—yet you would keep possession of the land?

text.NRSV: Say this to them, Thus says the Lord God: As I live, surely those who are in the waste places shall fall by the sword; and those who are in the open field I will give to the wild animals to be devoured; and those who are in the strongholds and in the caves shall die of pestilence.
text.Rotherham: Thus shalt thou say unto them, Thus saith My Lord Yahweh, As I live, surely, they who are in the waste places by the sword, shall fall, And him who is on the face of the field to the wild beast, have I given to be devoured,- And they who are in the mountain holds and in the pits :by pestilence, shall die;
text.KJV: 33:27 Say thou thus vnto them, Thus saith the Lord God, As I liue, surely they that are in the wastes, shall fall by the sword, and him that is in the open field will I giue to the beasts to be deuoured: and they that be in the forts and in the caues, shall die of the pestilence.
text.NABRE: 33:27 Say this to them: Thus says the Lord God: As I live, those among the ruins shall fall by the sword; those in the open field I have made food for the wild beasts; and those in rocky hideouts and caves shall die by the plague.

text.NRSV: I will make the land a desolation and a waste, and its proud might shall come to an end; and the mountains of Israel shall be so desolate that no one will pass through.
text.Rotherham: And I will make the land a desolation and an astonishment, So shall be made to cease the pride of her strength,- And the mountains of Israel shall be too desolate for any to pass through.
text.KJV: 33:28 For I will lay the land most desolate, and the pompe of her strength shall cease: and the mountaines of Israel shall bee desolate, that none shall passe through.
text.NABRE: 33:28 I will make the land a desolate waste, so that its proud strength will come to an end, and the mountains of Israel shall be so desolate that no one will cross them.

text.NRSV: Then they shall know that I am the Lord, when I have made the land a desolation and a waste because of all their abominations that they have committed.
text.Rotherham: So shall they know that I, am Yahweh,— When I make the land a desolation and an astonishment, because of all their abominations which they have committed.
text.KJV: 33:29 Then shall they know that I am the Lord, when I haue layed the land most desolate, because of all their abominations which they haue committed.
text.NABRE: 33:29 Thus they shall know that I am the Lord, when I make the land a desolate waste because of all the abominations they committed.

text.NRSV: As for you, mortal, your people who talk together about you by the walls and at the doors of the houses, say to one another, each to a neighbor, “Come and hear what the word is that comes from the Lord.”
text.Rotherham: Thou therefore Son of man, the sons of thy people who are talking against thee Near the walls and in the entrances of the houses, are speaking one with another, every man with his brother saying. Come in we pray you and heat, what is the word that is coming forth from Yahweh;
text.KJV: 33:30 ¶ Also thou sonne of man, the children of thy people still are talking against thee by the walles, and in the doores of the houses, and speake one to another, euery one to his brother, saying, Come, I pray you, and heare what is the word that commeth foorth from the Lord.
text.NABRE: 33:30 Popular Misunderstanding. As for you, son of man, your people are talking about you beside the walls and in the doorways of houses. They say to one another, “Let’s go hear the latest word that comes from the Lord.”

text.NRSV: They come to you as people come, and they sit before you as my people, and they hear your words, but they will not obey them. For flattery is on their lips, but their heart is set on their gain.
text.Rotherham: That they may come unto thee as people do come And may sit before thee as my people, And they will hear thy words, But, the words themselves, will they not do,— though fond with their mouths, they seem to be, After their unjust gain, their heart is going.
text.KJV: 33:31 And they come vnto thee as the people commeth, and they sit before thee as my people, and they heare thy words, but they will not doe them: for with their mouth they shew much loue, but their heart goeth after their couetousnesse.
text.NABRE: 33:31 My people come to you, gathering as a crowd and sitting in front of you to hear your words, but they will not act on them. Love songs are on their lips, but in their hearts they pursue dishonest gain.

text.NRSV: To them you are like a singer of love songs, one who has a beautiful voice and plays well on an instrument; they hear what you say, but they will not do it.
text.Rotherham: And lo! thou art to them— As a bewitching song, Of one with a beautiful voice. And skilfully touching the strings, —So will they hear thy words, And yet be going to do none of them.
text.KJV: 33:32 And loe, thou art vnto them as a very louely song of one that hath a pleasant voyce, and can play well on an instrument: for they heare thy wordes, but they doe them not.
text.NABRE: 33:32 For them you are only a singer of love songs, with a pleasant voice and a clever touch. They listen to your words, but they do not obey them.

text.NRSV: When this comes—and come it will!—then they shall know that a prophet has been among them.
text.Rotherham: But when it cometh Lo! it is coming, Then shall they know that a prophet hath been in their midst.
text.KJV: 33:33 And when this commeth to passe, (loe it will come) then shall they know that a Prophet hath bene among them.
text.NABRE: 33:33 But when it comes—and it is surely coming!—they shall know that there was a prophet among them.

text.NRSV: The word of the Lord came to me:
text.Rotherham: And the word of Yahweh came unto me, saying:
text.KJV: 34:1 And the word of þ Lord came vnto me, saying;
text.NABRE: 34:1 Chapter 34 Parable of the Shepherds. The word of the Lord came to me:

text.NRSV: Mortal, prophesy against the shepherds of Israel: prophesy, and say to them—to the shepherds: Thus says the Lord God: Ah, you shepherds of Israel who have been feeding yourselves! Should not shepherds feed the sheep?
text.Rotherham: Son of man, Prophesy against the shepherds of Israel,- Prophesy, and thou shalt say unto them, even to the shepherds— Thus, saith My Lord Yahweh— Alas! for the shepherds of Israel who have been tending, themselves, Is it not the flock that the shepherds should tend?
text.KJV: 34:2 Sonne of man, prophecie against the shepheards of Israel, prophecie and say vnto them, Thus saith the Lord God vnto the shepheards, Woe be to the shepheards of Israel that doe feede themselues: should not the shepheards feede the flockes?
text.NABRE: 34:2 Son of man, prophesy against the shepherds of Israel. Prophesy and say to them: To the shepherds, thus says the Lord God: Woe to the shepherds of Israel who have been pasturing themselves! Should not shepherds pasture the flock?

text.NRSV: You eat the fat, you clothe yourselves with the wool, you slaughter the fatlings; but you do not feed the sheep.
text.Rotherham: The milk, ye do eat And with the wool, ye do clothe your- selves, The well-fed, ye do sacrifice, The flock, ye do not tend
text.KJV: 34:3 Yee eate the fat, and ye clothe you with the wooll, yee kill them that are fed: but ye feede not the flocke.
text.NABRE: 34:3 You consumed milk, wore wool, and slaughtered fatlings, but the flock you did not pasture.

text.NRSV: You have not strengthened the weak, you have not healed the sick, you have not bound up the injured, you have not brought back the strayed, you have not sought the lost, but with force and harshness you have ruled them.
text.Rotherham: The weak, have ye not strengthened And, the sick, have ye not healed. And the torn, have ye not bound up, And that which was driven out, have ye not brought back, And that which was straying, have ye not sought out; But with force, have ye ruled them and with rigour.
text.KJV: 34:4 The diseased haue ye not strengthened, neither haue yee healed that which was sicke, neither haue ye bound vp that which was broken, neither haue yee brought againe that which was driuen away, neither haue yee sought that which was lost; but with force and with crueltie haue yee ruled them.
text.NABRE: 34:4 You did not strengthen the weak nor heal the sick nor bind up the injured. You did not bring back the stray or seek the lost but ruled them harshly and brutally.

text.NRSV: So they were scattered, because there was no shepherd; and scattered, they became food for all the wild animals.
text.Rotherham: And they were scattered, because there was no shepherd; And they became food for every wild beast of the field. So were they scattered.
text.KJV: 34:5 And they were scattered because there is no shepheard: and they became meate to all the beasts of the field, when they were scattered.
text.NABRE: 34:5 So they were scattered for lack of a shepherd, and became food for all the wild beasts. They were scattered

text.NRSV: My sheep were scattered over all the mountains and on every high hill; my sheep were scattered over all the face of the earth, with no one to search or seek for them.
text.Rotherham: My sheep did wander through all the mountains, And over every high hill,- And over all the face of the land, were my sheep scattered, And there was none to inquire And none to seek out.
text.KJV: 34:6 My sheepe wandered through all the mountaines, and vpon euery high hill: yea my flocke was scattered vpon all the face of the earth, and none did search or seeke after them.
text.NABRE: 34:6 and wandered over all the mountains and high hills; over the entire surface of the earth my sheep were scattered. No one looked after them or searched for them.

text.NRSV: Therefore, you shepherds, hear the word of the Lord:
text.Rotherham: Wherefore ye shepherds, hear ye the word of Yahweh:
text.KJV: 34:7 ¶ Therefore, yee shepheards, heare the word of the Lord.
text.NABRE: 34:7 Therefore, shepherds, hear the word of the Lord:

text.NRSV: As I live, says the Lord God, because my sheep have become a prey, and my sheep have become food for all the wild animals, since there was no shepherd; and because my shepherds have not searched for my sheep, but the shepherds have fed themselves, and have not fed my sheep;
text.Rotherham: As I live,— Declareth My Lord Yahweh, Surely because my flock became a prey. And my flock became food for every wild beast of the field, through having no shepherd, Neither did my shepherds inquire after the flock, —But the shepherds tended themselves. And my flock, they tended not
text.KJV: 34:8 As I liue, saith the Lord God, surely because my flocke became a pray, and my flocke became meate to euery beast of the field, because there was no shepheard, neither did my shepheards search for my flocke, but the shepheards fed themselues, and fed not my flocke:
text.NABRE: 34:8 As I live—oracle of the Lord God —because my sheep became plunder, because my sheep became food for wild beasts, for lack of a shepherd, because my shepherds did not look after my sheep, but pastured themselves and did not pasture my sheep,

text.NRSV: therefore, you shepherds, hear the word of the Lord:
text.Rotherham: Therefore ye shepherds, hear ye the word of Yahweh:
text.KJV: 34:9 Therefore, O yee shepheards, heare the word of the Lord.
text.NABRE: 34:9 therefore, shepherds, hear the word of the Lord:

text.NRSV: Thus says the Lord God, I am against the shepherds; and I will demand my sheep at their hand, and put a stop to their feeding the sheep; no longer shall the shepherds feed themselves. I will rescue my sheep from their mouths, so that they may not be food for them.
text.Rotherham: Thus, saith My Lord. Yahweh, Behold me! against the shepherds So then I will require my flock at their hand And will cause them to cease tending the flock, Neither shall the shepherds any longer tend themselves, But I will deliver my flock out of their mouth, that they may not be their food.
text.KJV: 34:10 Thus saith the Lord God, Behold, I am against the shepheards, and I will require my flocke at their hand, and cause them to cease from feeding the flocke, neither shall the shepheards feede themselues any more: for I will deliuer my flock from their mouth, that they may not be meat for them.
text.NABRE: 34:10 Thus says the Lord God: Look! I am coming against these shepherds. I will take my sheep out of their hand and put a stop to their shepherding my flock, so that these shepherds will no longer pasture them. I will deliver my flock from their mouths so it will not become their food.

text.NRSV: For thus says the Lord God: I myself will search for my sheep, and will seek them out.
text.Rotherham: For Thus saith My Lord. Yahweh,- Here am I myself Therefore will I inquire after my flock and seek them out:
text.KJV: 34:11 ¶ For thus saith the Lord God, Behold, I, euen I will both search my sheepe, and seeke them out.
text.NABRE: 34:11 For thus says the Lord God: Look! I myself will search for my sheep and examine them.

text.NRSV: As shepherds seek out their flocks when they are among their scattered sheep, so I will seek out my sheep. I will rescue them from all the places to which they have been scattered on a day of clouds and thick darkness.
text.Rotherham: As a shepherd seeketh out his flock in the day he is in the midst of his sheep that are scattered, So! will I seek out my sheep, and will deliver them out of all the places where they were scattered in the day of cloud and thick darkness;
text.KJV: 34:12 As a shepheard seeketh out his flocke in the day that hee is among his sheepe that are scattered: so wil I seeke out my sheep, and will deliuer them out of all places, where they haue bene scattered in the cloudie and darke day.
text.NABRE: 34:12 As a shepherd examines his flock while he himself is among his scattered sheep, so will I examine my sheep. I will deliver them from every place where they were scattered on the day of dark clouds.

text.NRSV: I will bring them out from the peoples and gather them from the countries, and will bring them into their own land; and I will feed them on the mountains of Israel, by the watercourses, and in all the inhabited parts of the land.
text.Rotherham: And I will bring them out from among the peoples And will gather them out of the lands, And will bring them upon their own soil, And will tend them Upon the mountains of Israel, In the ravines. And in all the habitable places of the land:
text.KJV: 34:13 And I will bring them out from the people, and gather them from the countreys, and will bring them to their owne land, and feede them vpon the mountaines of Israel by the riuers, and in all the inhabited places of the countrey,
text.NABRE: 34:13 I will lead them out from among the peoples and gather them from the lands; I will bring them back to their own country and pasture them upon the mountains of Israel, in the ravines and every inhabited place in the land.

text.NRSV: I will feed them with good pasture, and the mountain heights of Israel shall be their pasture; there they shall lie down in good grazing land, and they shall feed on rich pasture on the mountains of Israel.
text.Rotherham: In good pastures, will I feed them, And on the mountains of the height of Israel, shall be their fold,— There, shall they lie down in a fold that is good, And on pasture that is fat, shall they feed. among the mountains of Israel.
text.KJV: 34:14 I will feede them in a good pasture, and vpon the high mountaines of Israel shall their folde be: there shall they lie in a good folde, and in a fat pasture shall they feede vpon the mountaines of Israel.
text.NABRE: 34:14 In good pastures I will pasture them; on the mountain heights of Israel will be their grazing land. There they will lie down on good grazing ground; in rich pastures they will be pastured on the mountains of Israel.

text.NRSV: I myself will be the shepherd of my sheep, and I will make them lie down, says the Lord God.
text.Rotherham: I myself, will tend my flock. And, I myself, will cause them to lie down, Declareth My Lord Yahweh:
text.KJV: 34:15 I will feed my flocke, and I will cause them to lie downe, saith the Lord God.
text.NABRE: 34:15 I myself will pasture my sheep; I myself will give them rest—oracle of the Lord God.

text.NRSV: I will seek the lost, and I will bring back the strayed, and I will bind up the injured, and I will strengthen the weak, but the fat and the strong I will destroy. I will feed them with justice.
text.Rotherham: That which is straying, will I seek out. And that which hath been driven away, will I bring back, And that which is torn, will I bind up, And the weak, will I strengthen,- But the fat and the strong, will I watch I will feed them with justice.
text.KJV: 34:16 I will seeke that which was lost, and bring againe that which was driuen away, and will bind vp that which was broken, and will strengthen that which was sicke: but I will destroy the fat and the strong, I will feed them with iudgement.
text.NABRE: 34:16 The lost I will search out, the strays I will bring back, the injured I will bind up, and the sick I will heal; but the sleek and the strong I will destroy. I will shepherd them in judgment.

text.NRSV: As for you, my flock, thus says the Lord God: I shall judge between sheep and sheep, between rams and goats.
text.Rotherham: And as for you O my flock, Thus saith My Lord. Yahweh: Behold me! judging between one kind of small cattle and another as well the rams as the he-goats.
text.KJV: 34:17 And as for you, O my flocke, thus saith the Lord God, Behold, I iudge betweene cattell and cattell, betweene the rammes and the hee goates.
text.NABRE: 34:17 Separation of the Sheep. As for you, my flock, thus says the Lord God: I will judge between one sheep and another, between rams and goats.

text.NRSV: Is it not enough for you to feed on the good pasture, but you must tread down with your feet the rest of your pasture? When you drink of clear water, must you foul the rest with your feet?
text.Rotherham: Is it too small a thing for you that on the good pasture, ye feed, But the remainder of your pastures, ye must needs trample down with your feet? Or that of the pure waters, ye drink But the waters left remaining—with your feet, ye must needs foul?
text.KJV: 34:18 Seemeth it a small thing vnto you, to haue eaten vp the good pasture, but ye must tread downe with your feet the residue of your pastures? and to haue drunke of the deepe waters, but yee must fonle the residue with your feete?
text.NABRE: 34:18 Was it not enough for you to graze on the best pasture, that you had to trample the rest of your pastures with your hooves? Or to drink the clearest water, that you had to pollute the rest with your hooves?

text.NRSV: And must my sheep eat what you have trodden with your feet, and drink what you have fouled with your feet?
text.Rotherham: And my flock On what hath been trampled down by your feet, may feed, And of what hath been fouled by your feet, may drink?
text.KJV: 34:19 And as for my flocke, they eate that which yee haue troden with your feete: and they drinke that which yee haue fouled with your feete.
text.NABRE: 34:19 Thus my flock had to graze on what your hooves had trampled and drink what your hooves had polluted.

text.NRSV: Therefore, thus says the Lord God to them: I myself will judge between the fat sheep and the lean sheep.
text.Rotherham: Therefore Thus, saith My Lord Yahweh, unto them: Here am I myself. Therefore will I judge between fat sheep and lean sheep,
text.KJV: 34:20 ¶ Therefore thus saith the Lord God vnto them, Behold, I, euen I will iudge betweene the fat cattell, and betweene the leane cattell.
text.NABRE: 34:20 Therefore thus says the Lord God: Now I will judge between the fat and the lean.

text.NRSV: Because you pushed with flank and shoulder, and butted at all the weak animals with your horns until you scattered them far and wide,
text.Rotherham: Because with the side and with the shoulder, ye do thrust, And with your horns, ye do push all the sick,— Until you have scattered them abroad
text.KJV: 34:21 Because yee haue thrust with side and with shoulder, and pusht all the diseased with your hornes, till yee haue scattered them abroad:
text.NABRE: 34:21 Because you push with flank and shoulder, and butt all the weak sheep with your horns until you drive them off,

text.NRSV: I will save my flock, and they shall no longer be a prey; and I will judge between sheep and sheep.
text.Rotherham: Therefore will I bring salvation to my flock, and they shall be no longer a prey,—but I will judge between one sheep and another,
text.KJV: 34:22 Therefore will I saue my flocke, and they shall no more be a pray, and I will iudge betweene cattell and cattell.
text.NABRE: 34:22 I will save my flock so they can no longer be plundered; I will judge between one sheep and another.

text.NRSV: I will set up over them one shepherd, my servant David, and he shall feed them: he shall feed them and be their shepherd.
text.Rotherham: And I will raise up over them one shepherd And he shall tend them, Even my servant David,— He, will tend them, And, he, will become to them a shepherd;
text.KJV: 34:23 And I will set vp one shepheard ouer them, and hee shall feede them, euen my seruant Dauid; he shall feede them, and hee shall be their shepheard.
text.NABRE: 34:23 I will appoint one shepherd over them to pasture them, my servant David; he shall pasture them and be their shepherd.

text.NRSV: And I, the Lord, will be their God, and my servant David shall be prince among them; I, the Lord, have spoken.
text.Rotherham: And, I Yahweh, will become to them a God. my servant David, being a prince in their midst,— I Yahweh, have spoken;
text.KJV: 34:24 And I the Lord will be their God, and my seruant Dauid a prince among them, I the Lord haue spoken it.
text.NABRE: 34:24 I, the Lord, will be their God, and my servant David will be prince in their midst. I, the Lord, have spoken.

text.NRSV: I will make with them a covenant of peace and banish wild animals from the land, so that they may live in the wild and sleep in the woods securely.
text.Rotherham: And I will solemnise for them a covenant of prosperity, And will cause to cease the mischievous wild-beast out of the land, And they shall dwell in the wilderness, securely, And shall sleep in the forests;
text.KJV: 34:25 And I will make with them a couenant of peace, and will cause the euill beasts to cease out of the land: and they shall dwell safely in the wildernesse, and sleepe in the woods.
text.NABRE: 34:25 I will make a covenant of peace with them and rid the country of wild beasts so they will dwell securely in the wilderness and sleep in the forests.

text.NRSV: I will make them and the region around my hill a blessing; and I will send down the showers in their season; they shall be showers of blessing.
text.Rotherham: And I, will make them and the places round about my hill a blessing,- And I will cause the abundant rain to come down in its season abundant rains of blessing, shall they be;
text.KJV: 34:26 And I will make them and the places round about my hill, a blessing; and I will cause the showre to come downe in his season: there shall bee showres of blessing.
text.NABRE: 34:26 I will settle them around my hill and send rain in its season, the blessing of abundant rain.

text.NRSV: The trees of the field shall yield their fruit, and the earth shall yield its increase. They shall be secure on their soil; and they shall know that I am the Lord, when I break the bars of their yoke, and rescue them from the hands of those who enslaved them.
text.Rotherham: And the tree of the field shall yield his fruit And, the land, shall yield her increase, And they shall remain on their own soil in security,- So shall they know that I, am Yahweh, When I have broken the bars of their yoke, And shall deliver them out of the hand of them who have been using them as slaves.
text.KJV: 34:27 And the tree of the field shal yeeld her fruite, and the earth shall yeeld her increase, and they shall be safe in their land, and shall know that I am the Lord, when I haue broken the bands of their yoke, and deliuered them out of the hand of those that serued themselues of them.
text.NABRE: 34:27 The trees of the field shall bear their fruits, and the land its crops, and they shall dwell securely on their own soil. They shall know that I am the Lord when I break the bars of their yoke and deliver them from the power of those who enslaved them.

text.NRSV: They shall no more be a prey to the nations, nor shall the wild animals of the land devour them; they shall live in safety, and no one shall make them afraid.
text.Rotherham: And they shall be no longer a prey for the nations, Nor shall the wild beast of the earth! devour them,— But they shall dwell securely with none to put them in terror.
text.KJV: 34:28 And they shall no more be a pray to the heathen, neither shall the beasts of the land deuoure them; but they shall dwell safely, and none shall make them afraide.
text.NABRE: 34:28 They shall no longer be plundered by the nations nor will wild beasts devour them, but they shall dwell securely, with no one to frighten them.

text.NRSV: I will provide for them a splendid vegetation so that they shall no more be consumed by hunger in the land, and no longer suffer the insults of the nations.
text.Rotherham: And I will raise up unto them a plantation for fame,- And there shall be no longer the destroyed of hunger in the land, Neither shall they bear any longer the reproach of the nations.
text.KJV: 34:29 And I will raise vp for them a plant of renowne, and they shall be no more consumed with hunger in the land, neither beare the shame of the heathen any more.
text.NABRE: 34:29 I will prepare for them peaceful fields for planting so they are never again swept away by famine in the land or bear taunts from the nations.

text.NRSV: They shall know that I, the Lord their God, am with them, and that they, the house of Israel, are my people, says the Lord God.
text.Rotherham: So shall they know that, I, Yahweh their God am with them,- And that they are my people the house of Israel, Declareth My Lord. Yahweh.
text.KJV: 34:30 Thus shall they know that I the Lord their God am with them, and that they, euen the house of Israel, are my people, saith the Lord God.
text.NABRE: 34:30 Thus they shall know that I, the Lord, their God, am with them, and that they are my people, the house of Israel—oracle of the Lord God.

text.NRSV: You are my sheep, the sheep of my pasture and I am your God, says the Lord God.
text.Rotherham: Ye, therefore, my flock the flock of my pasture, are, men,— I, am your God, Declareth My Lord Yahweh.
text.KJV: 34:31 And yee my flocke of my pasture, are men, and I am your God, saith the Lord God.
text.NABRE: 34:31 Yes, you are my flock: you people are the flock of my pasture, and I am your God—oracle of the Lord God.

text.NRSV: The word of the Lord came to me:
text.Rotherham: And the word of Yahweh came unto me, saying,
text.KJV: 35:1 Moreouer the word of the Lord came vnto mee, saying;
text.NABRE: 35:1 Chapter 35 Against Edom. The word of the Lord came to me:

text.NRSV: Mortal, set your face against Mount Seir, and prophesy against it,
text.Rotherham: Son of man Set thy face against Mount Seir,—and prophesy against it;
text.KJV: 35:2 Sonne of man, set thy face against mount Seir, and prophecie against it,
text.NABRE: 35:2 Son of man, set your face against Mount Seir and prophesy against it.

text.NRSV: and say to it, Thus says the Lord God: I am against you, Mount Seir; I will stretch out my hand against you to make you a desolation and a waste.
text.Rotherham: and thou shalt say to it Thus saith My Lord Yahweh, Behold me! against thee Mount Seir,—Therefore will I stretch out my hand against thee, And I will make thee a desolation and an astonishment:
text.KJV: 35:3 And say vnto it, Thus saith the Lord God; Behold, O mount Seir, I am against thee, and I will stretch out mine hand against thee, and I will make thee most desolate.
text.NABRE: 35:3 Say to it: Thus says the Lord God: Watch out! I am against you, Mount Seir. I will stretch out my hand against you and turn you into a desolate waste.

text.NRSV: I will lay your towns in ruins, and you shall become a desolation; and you shall know that I am the Lord.
text.Rotherham: Thy cities, will I lay waste, And thou—a desolation, shalt become, So shalt thou know that I, am Yahweh.
text.KJV: 35:4 I will lay thy cities waste, and thou shalt be desolate, and thou shalt know that I am the Lord.
text.NABRE: 35:4 Your cities I will turn into ruins, and you shall be a desolation; then you shall know that I am the Lord.

text.NRSV: Because you cherished an ancient enmity, and gave over the people of Israel to the power of the sword at the time of their calamity, at the time of their final punishment;
text.Rotherham: Because thou hast had an age-abiding enmity, And hast delivered up the sons of Israel unto the hands of the sword,- In the time of their misfortune, In the time of the final punishment for iniquity,
text.KJV: 35:5 Because thou hast had a perpetuall hatred, and hast shed the blood of the children of Israel by the force of the sword in the time of their calamitie, in the time that their iniquitie had an end;
text.NABRE: 35:5 Because you nursed a long-standing hatred and handed the Israelites over to the sword at the time of their collapse, at the time of their final punishment,

text.NRSV: therefore, as I live, says the Lord God, I will prepare you for blood, and blood shall pursue you; since you did not hate bloodshed, bloodshed shall pursue you.
text.Rotherham: Therefore, as I live, Declareth My Lord Yahweh, Surely regarding blood, will I deal with thee, Blood therefore, shall pursue thee,-Since blood thou hast not hated, Therefore blood, shall pursue thee,
text.KJV: 35:6 Therefore, as I liue, saith the Lord God, I will prepare thee vnto blood, and blood shall pursue thee: sith thou hast not hated blood, euen blood shall pursue thee.
text.NABRE: 35:6 therefore, as I live—oracle of the Lord God —you are guilty of blood, and blood, I swear, shall pursue you.

text.NRSV: I will make Mount Seir a waste and a desolation; and I will cut off from it all who come and go.
text.Rotherham: So then I will deliver up Mount Seir to desolation after desolation,- And will cut off therefrom him that passeth by and him that returneth,
text.KJV: 35:7 Thus will I make mount Seir most desolate, and cut off from it him that passeth out, & him that returneth.
text.NABRE: 35:7 I will make Mount Seir a desolate waste and cut off from it anyone who travels across it and back.

text.NRSV: I will fill its mountains with the slain; on your hills and in your valleys and in all your watercourses those killed with the sword shall fall.
text.Rotherham: And I will fill his mountains with his slain,— As for thy hills and thy hollows and all thy channels, they who are thrust through by the sword shall fall therein:
text.KJV: 35:8 And I will fill his mountaines with his slaine men: in thy hilles, and in thy valleis, and in all thy riuers shall they fall that are slaine with the sword.
text.NABRE: 35:8 I will fill its mountains with the slain; those slain by the sword shall fall on your hills, into your valleys and all your ravines.

text.NRSV: I will make you a perpetual desolation, and your towns shall never be inhabited. Then you shall know that I am the Lord.
text.Rotherham: Desolations age-abiding, will I make thee, And thy cities, shall not be inhabited,- So shall ye know that, I, am Yahweh.
text.KJV: 35:9 I will make thee perpetuall desolations, & thy cities shall not returne, and ye shal know that I am the Lord
text.NABRE: 35:9 I will make you a desolation forever, your cities will not be inhabited, and you shall know that I am the Lord.

text.NRSV: Because you said, “These two nations and these two countries shall be mine, and we will take possession of them,” although the Lord was there;
text.Rotherham: Because thou hast said, the two nations, and the two lands, mine, shall become, that we may possess it Whereas Yahweh, had been there,
text.KJV: 35:10 Because thou hast said; These two nations, and these two countries shall be mine, and we will possesse it, whereas the Lord was there:
text.NABRE: 35:10 Because you said: The two nations and the two lands belong to me; let us take possession of them—although the Lord was there—

text.NRSV: therefore, as I live, says the Lord God, I will deal with you according to the anger and envy that you showed because of your hatred against them; and I will make myself known among you, when I judge you.
text.Rotherham: Therefore as I live, Declareth My Lord Yahweh, I will even deal according to thine anger, and according to thine envy, wherewith thou hast dealt, out of thy hatred with them,- So will I make myself known among them as soon as I shall judge thee
text.KJV: 35:11 Therefore, as I liue, saith the Lord God, I will euen doe according to thine anger, and according to thine enuie, which thou hast vsed out of thy hatred against them: and I will make my selfe knowen amongst them, when I haue iudged thee.
text.NABRE: 35:11 therefore, as I live—oracle of the Lord God —I will deal with you according to the anger and envy you dealt out to them in your hatred, and I will make myself known to them when I execute judgment on you,

text.NRSV: You shall know that I, the Lord, have heard all the abusive things you have said against the mountains of Israel, saying, “They are laid desolate, they are given us to devour.”
text.Rotherham: And thou shalt know that, I Yahweh, have heard all thy revilings which thou hast uttered against the mountains of Israel saying, They have become desolate,— To us, have they been given for food;
text.KJV: 35:12 And thou shalt know, that I am the Lord, and that I haue heard all thy blasphemies which thou hast spoken against the mountaines of Israel, saying; They are layed desolate, they are giuen vs to consume.
text.NABRE: 35:12 then you shall know that I am the Lord. I have heard all the insults you spoke against the mountains of Israel, saying: They are desolate; they have been given to us to devour.

text.NRSV: And you magnified yourselves against me with your mouth, and multiplied your words against me; I heard it.
text.Rotherham: And so ye have magnified yourselves against me with your mouth, And have caused to abound against me your words, —I, have heard!
text.KJV: 35:13 Thus with your mouth yee haue boasted against me, & haue multiplied your words against me: I haue heard them.
text.NABRE: 35:13 You boasted against me with your mouths and used insolent words against me. I heard everything!

text.NRSV: Thus says the Lord God: As the whole earth rejoices, I will make you desolate.
text.Rotherham: Thus, saith My Lord Yahweh,— When all the earth is rejoicing, a desolation, will I make thee:
text.KJV: 35:14 Thus saith the Lord God; When the whole earth reioyceth, I will make thee desolate.
text.NABRE: 35:14 Thus says the Lord God: Because you rejoiced that the whole land was desolate, so I will do to you.

text.NRSV: As you rejoiced over the inheritance of the house of Israel, because it was desolate, so I will deal with you; you shall be desolate, Mount Seir, and all Edom, all of it. Then they shall know that I am the Lord.
text.Rotherham: As thou didst rejoice over the inheritance of the house of Israel because it had become a desolation, so, will, I, do unto thee,— A desolation, shalt thou become, O Mount Seir And all Edom all of it, So shall they know that, I, am Yahweh.
text.KJV: 35:15 As thou didst reioyce at the inheritance of the house of Israel, because it was desolate, so will I doe vnto thee: thou shalt be desolate, O mount Seir, and all Idumea, euen all of it, and they shall know that I am the Lord.
text.NABRE: 35:15 As you rejoiced over the devastation of the heritage of the house of Israel, the same I will do to you: you will become a ruin, Mount Seir, and the whole of Edom, all of it! Then they shall know that I am the Lord.

text.NRSV: And you, mortal, prophesy to the mountains of Israel, and say: O mountains of Israel, hear the word of the Lord.
text.Rotherham: Thou therefore. Son of man, Prophesy unto the mountains of Israel,—and thou shalt say, Ye mountains of Israel Hear ye the word of Yahweh.
text.KJV: 36:1 Also thou sonne of man, prophecie vnto the mountaines of Israel, and say; Ye mountaines of Israel, Heare the word of the Lord.
text.NABRE: 36:1 Chapter 36 Regeneration of the Land. As for you, son of man, prophesy to the mountains of Israel and say: Mountains of Israel, hear the word of the Lord!

text.NRSV: Thus says the Lord God: Because the enemy said of you, “Aha!” and, “The ancient heights have become our possession,”
text.Rotherham: Thus saith My Lord, Yahweh, Because the enemy hath said concerning you Aha! Even the high places of age-past times, for a possession have become ours
text.KJV: 36:2 Thus saith the Lord God, Because the enemy had said against you, Aha, euen the ancient high places are ours in possession:
text.NABRE: 36:2 Thus says the Lord God: Because the enemy said about you, “Ha! the ancient heights have become our possession,”

text.NRSV: therefore prophesy, and say: Thus says the Lord God: Because they made you desolate indeed, and crushed you from all sides, so that you became the possession of the rest of the nations, and you became an object of gossip and slander among the people;
text.Rotherham: Therefore, prophesy, and thou shalt say, Thus saith My Lord Yahweh-Because even because they have desolated and panted for you on every side That ye should become a possession to the rest of the nations, And ye have come up into the talk of the tongue and the slander of the people
text.KJV: 36:3 Therfore prophecie and say, Thus saith the Lord God, Because they haue made you desolate, and swallowed you vp on euery side, that ye might be a possession vnto the residue of the heathen, and ye are taken vp in the lips of talkers, and are an infamy of the people:
text.NABRE: 36:3 therefore prophesy and say: Thus says the Lord God: because you have been ridiculed and hounded on all sides for becoming a possession for the remaining nations and have become a byword and a popular jeer,

text.NRSV: therefore, O mountains of Israel, hear the word of the Lord God: Thus says the Lord God to the mountains and the hills, the watercourses and the valleys, the desolate wastes and the deserted towns, which have become a source of plunder and mockery to the rest of the nations all around;
text.Rotherham: Therefore ye mountains of Israel, hear ye the word of My Lord Yahweh,— Thus saith My Lord, Yahweh, To the mountains and to the hills, to the channels and to the valleys, and to the desolate waste places and to the cities that are forsaken, which have become a prey and a derision, to the rest of the nations which are on every side:
text.KJV: 36:4 Therefore ye mountaines of Israel, heare the word of the Lord God, Thus saith the Lord God to the mountaines and to the hilles, to the riuers and to the valleys, to the desolate wastes, and to the cities that are forsaken, which became a pray and derision to the residue of the heathen that are round about:
text.NABRE: 36:4 therefore, mountains of Israel, hear the word of the Lord God: Thus says the Lord God to the mountains and hills, to the ravines and valleys, to the desolate ruins and abandoned cities, plundered and mocked by the nations remaining around you:

text.NRSV: therefore thus says the Lord God: I am speaking in my hot jealousy against the rest of the nations, and against all Edom, who, with wholehearted joy and utter contempt, took my land as their possession, to devote its pasture to plunder.
text.Rotherham: Therefore, Thus, saith My Lord, Yahweh, Surely in the fire of my jealousy, have I spoken against the rest of the nations and against Edom all of it,— Who have given my land to themselves for a possession, In the rejoicing of all the heart In contempt of soul, To make of its produce a prey.
text.KJV: 36:5 Therefore thus saith the Lord God, Surely in the fire of my ielousie haue I spoken against the residue of the heathen, and against al Idumea, which haue appointed my land into their possession, with the ioy of all their heart, with despitefull minds to cast it out for a praye.
text.NABRE: 36:5 therefore thus says the Lord God: Truly, with burning jealousy I speak against the remaining nations and against Edom; they all took possession of my land for plunder with wholehearted joy and utter contempt.

text.NRSV: Therefore prophesy concerning the land of Israel, and say to the mountains and hills, to the watercourses and valleys, Thus says the Lord God: I am speaking in my jealous fury, because you have suffered the insults of the nations;
text.Rotherham: Therefore prophesy, concerning the soil of Israel,—and say to the mountains and to the hills to the channels and to the valleys, Thus, saith My Lord Yahweh, Behold me! In my jealousy and in mine indignation, have I spoken, Because the insult of the nations, ye have borne;
text.KJV: 36:6 Prophecie therefore concerning the land of Israel, and say vnto the mountaines and to the hilles, to the riuers and to the valleys, Thus saith the Lord God, Behold, I haue spoken in my iealousie and in my furie, because ye haue borne the shame of the heathen,
text.NABRE: 36:6 Therefore, prophesy concerning the land of Israel and say to the mountains and hills, to the ravines and valleys: Thus says the Lord God: See! in my jealous fury I speak, because you endured the reproach of the nations.

text.NRSV: therefore thus says the Lord God: I swear that the nations that are all around you shall themselves suffer insults.
text.Rotherham: Therefore Thus saith My Lord Yahweh, I myself have lifted my hand,- Surely the nations which are yours round about, they their own shame, shall bear:
text.KJV: 36:7 Therefore thus saith the Lord God, I haue lifted vp mine hand, Surely the heathen that are about you, they shall beare their shame.
text.NABRE: 36:7 Therefore, thus says the Lord God: I raise my hand and swear: the nations around you shall bear their own reproach.

text.NRSV: But you, O mountains of Israel, shall shoot forth your branches, and yield your fruit to my people Israel; for they shall soon come home.
text.Rotherham: But ye O mountains of Israel Your boughs, shall ye shoot forth, And your fruit, shall ye bear For my people Israel, For they have drawn near to enter.
text.KJV: 36:8 ¶ But ye, O mountaines of Israel, ye shall shoot forth your branches, and yeeld your fruit to my people of Israel, for they are at hand to come.
text.NABRE: 36:8 But you, mountains of Israel, you will sprout branches and bear fruit for my people Israel, for they are coming soon.

text.NRSV: See now, I am for you; I will turn to you, and you shall be tilled and sown;
text.Rotherham: For lo! I am towards you, Therefore will I turn towards you, And ye shall be tilled and sown;
text.KJV: 36:9 For behold, I am for you, and I will turne vnto you, and ye shall be tilled and sowen.
text.NABRE: 36:9 Look! I am for you! I will turn my face toward you; you will be plowed and planted.

text.NRSV: and I will multiply your population, the whole house of Israel, all of it; the towns shall be inhabited and the waste places rebuilt;
text.Rotherham: And I will multiply, upon you—men, All the house of Israel All of it, Then shall the cities be inhabited, And the waste places, shall be built,
text.KJV: 36:10 And I will multiplie men vpon you, all the house of Israel, euen all of it, and the cities shall be inhabited, and the wastes shall be builded.
text.NABRE: 36:10 Upon you I will multiply the whole house of Israel; cities shall be resettled and ruins rebuilt.

text.NRSV: and I will multiply human beings and animals upon you; and they shall increase and be fruitful; and I will cause you to be inhabited as in your former times, and will do more good to you than ever before. Then you shall know that I am the Lord.
text.Rotherham: And I will multiply upon you—man and beast, And they shall multiply and be fruitful,— And I will cause you to be inhabited as in your former estates. And will do you more good than at your beginnings, So shall ye know that am Yahweh;
text.KJV: 36:11 And I will multiply vpon you man and beast, and they shall increase and bring fruite, and I will settle you after your olde estates: and will doe better vnto you, then at your beginnings, and ye shall know that I am the Lord.
text.NABRE: 36:11 Upon you I will multiply people and animals so they can multiply and be fruitful. I will resettle you as in the past, and make you more prosperous than at your beginning; then you shall know that I am the Lord.

text.NRSV: I will lead people upon you—my people Israel; they shall possess you, and you shall be their inheritance; no longer shall you bereave them of children.
text.Rotherham: And I will bring upon you—men even my people Israel That they may possess thee, So shalt thou be theirs, as an inheritance, -And thou shalt no more again make them childless.
text.KJV: 36:12 Yea I will cause men to walke vpon you, euen my people Israel, and they shall possesse thee, and thou shalt be their inheritance, and thou shalt no more henceforth bereaue them of men.
text.NABRE: 36:12 Upon you I will have them walk, my people Israel. They shall possess you, and you shall be their heritage. Never again shall you rob them of their children.

text.NRSV: Thus says the Lord God: Because they say to you, “You devour people, and you bereave your nation of children,”
text.Rotherham: Thus saith My Lord, Yahweh, Because they are saying to you. A devourer of men, thou art, And one that didst make childless thy nations, hast thou been
text.KJV: 36:13 Thus saith the Lord God, Because they say vnto you, Thou land deuourest vp men, and hast bereaued thy nations,
text.NABRE: 36:13 Thus says the Lord God: Because they say of you, “You devour your own people, you rob your nation of its children,”

text.NRSV: therefore you shall no longer devour people and no longer bereave your nation of children, says the Lord God;
text.Rotherham: Therefore, men, shalt thou not devour any more,- And thy nations, shalt thou make childless no more, Declareth My Lord Yahweh;
text.KJV: 36:14 Therefore thou shalt deuoure men no more, neither bereaue thy nations any more, saith the Lord God.
text.NABRE: 36:14 therefore, you shall never again devour your people or rob your nation of its children—oracle of the Lord God.

text.NRSV: and I will no longer let you hear the insults of the nations, no longer shall you bear the disgrace of the peoples; and no longer shall you cause your nation to stumble, says the Lord God.
text.Rotherham: And I will not suffer to be heard against thee any more, the insult of the nations, And the reproach of the peoples, shalt thou not bear any more,- And thy nations, shalt thou not cause to stumble any more, Declareth My Lord Yahweh.
text.KJV: 36:15 Neither will I cause men to heare in thee the shame of the heathen any more, neither shalt thou beare the reproch of the people any more, neither shalt thou cause the nations to fall any more, saith the Lord God.
text.NABRE: 36:15 I will no longer make you listen to the reproach of nations. You will never again endure insults from the peoples. Never again shall you rob your nation of its children—oracle of the Lord God.

text.NRSV: The word of the Lord came to me:
text.Rotherham: And the word of Yahweh came unto me saying:
text.KJV: 36:16 ¶ Moreouer the worde of the Lord came vnto me, saying,
text.NABRE: 36:16 Regeneration of the People. The word of the Lord came to me:

text.NRSV: Mortal, when the house of Israel lived on their own soil, they defiled it by their ways and their deeds; their conduct in my sight was like the uncleanness of a woman in her menstrual period.
text.Rotherham: Son of man The house of Israel were dwelling upon their own soil, But they defiled it by their way, and by their doings. Like the defilement of her that is removed, became their way before me.
text.KJV: 36:17 Sonne of man, when the house of Israel dwelt in their own land, they defiled it by their owne way, and by their doings: their way was before me as the vncleannesse of a remooued woman.
text.NABRE: 36:17 Son of man, when the house of Israel lived in its land, they defiled it with their behavior and their deeds. In my sight their behavior was like the impurity of a woman in menstruation.

text.NRSV: So I poured out my fury upon them for the blood that they had shed upon the land, and for the idols with which they had defiled it.
text.Rotherham: So I poured out mine indignation upon them, Because of the blood which they had shed upon the land,- Yea with their manufactured gods, had they defiled it.
text.KJV: 36:18 Wherefore I powred my furie vpon them for the blood that they had shed vpon the land, and for their idoles wherewith they had polluted it.
text.NABRE: 36:18 So I poured out my fury upon them for the blood they poured out on the ground and for the idols with which they defiled it.

text.NRSV: I scattered them among the nations, and they were dispersed through the countries; in accordance with their conduct and their deeds I judged them.
text.Rotherham: So I dispersed them among the nations, And they were scattered throughout the lands,— According to their way and according to their doings, I judged them.
text.KJV: 36:19 And I scattered them among the heathen, and they were dispersed through the countreys: according to their way and according to their doings I iudged them.
text.NABRE: 36:19 I scattered them among the nations, and they were dispersed through other lands; according to their behavior and their deeds I carried out judgment against them.

text.NRSV: But when they came to the nations, wherever they came, they profaned my holy name, in that it was said of them, “These are the people of the Lord, and yet they had to go out of his land.”
text.Rotherham: But when they entered among the nations where they did enter, then profaned they my holy Name,—in that it was said of them The people of Yahweh, these! Yet from his land, have they come forth!
text.KJV: 36:20 And when they entred vnto the heathen whither they went, they prophaned my holy Name, when they said to them, These are the people of the Lord, and are gone forth out of his land.
text.NABRE: 36:20 But when they came to the nations, where they went, they desecrated my holy name, for people said of them: “These are the people of the Lord, yet they had to leave their land.”

text.NRSV: But I had concern for my holy name, which the house of Israel had profaned among the nations to which they came.
text.Rotherham: So then I had tender regard for my holy Name,- Which the house of Israel had profaned, among the nations, where they had entered.
text.KJV: 36:21 ¶ But I had pitie for mine holy Name, which the house of Israel had prophaned among the heathen, whither they went.
text.NABRE: 36:21 So I relented because of my holy name which the house of Israel desecrated among the nations to which they came.

text.NRSV: Therefore say to the house of Israel, Thus says the Lord God: It is not for your sake, O house of Israel, that I am about to act, but for the sake of my holy name, which you have profaned among the nations to which you came.
text.Rotherham: Therefore say thou to the house of Israel Thus saith My Lord Yahweh, Not for your sakes, am I working. O house of Israel, But for my holy Name which ye have profaned, among the nations where ye have entered;
text.KJV: 36:22 Therefore say vnto the house of Israel, Thus saith the Lord God, I doe not this for your sakes, O house of Israel, but for mine holy Names sake, which ye haue prophaned among the heathen, whither ye went.
text.NABRE: 36:22 Therefore say to the house of Israel: Thus says the Lord God: Not for your sake do I act, house of Israel, but for the sake of my holy name, which you desecrated among the nations to which you came.

text.NRSV: I will sanctify my great name, which has been profaned among the nations, and which you have profaned among them; and the nations shall know that I am the Lord, says the Lord God, when through you I display my holiness before their eyes.
text.Rotherham: Therefore will I hallow my great Name, that hath been profaned among the nations, which ye have profaned in their midst,-So shall the nations know that I am Yahweh Declareth My Lord, Yahweh, When I have hallowed myself in you, before their eyes.
text.KJV: 36:23 And I will sanctifie my great Name which was prophaned among the heathen, which ye haue prophaned in the midst of them, and the heathen shall know, that I am the Lord, saith the Lord God, when I shall be sanctified in you before their eyes.
text.NABRE: 36:23 But I will show the holiness of my great name, desecrated among the nations, in whose midst you desecrated it. Then the nations shall know that I am the Lord —oracle of the Lord God —when through you I show my holiness before their very eyes.

text.NRSV: I will take you from the nations, and gather you from all the countries, and bring you into your own land.
text.Rotherham: Therefore will I take you from among the nations, And gather you out of all the lands,- And will bring you upon your own soil;
text.KJV: 36:24 For I will take you from among the heathen, and gather you out of all countreys, and will bring you into your owne land.
text.NABRE: 36:24 I will take you away from among the nations, gather you from all the lands, and bring you back to your own soil.

text.NRSV: I will sprinkle clean water upon you, and you shall be clean from all your uncleannesses, and from all your idols I will cleanse you.
text.Rotherham: And I will throw upon you clean water and ye shall be clean,— From all your uncleannesses and from all your manufactured gods, will I cleanse you;
text.KJV: 36:25 ¶ Then will I sprinckle cleane water vpon you, and ye shalbe cleane: from all your filthinesse, and from all your idoles wil I cleanse you.
text.NABRE: 36:25 I will sprinkle clean water over you to make you clean; from all your impurities and from all your idols I will cleanse you.

text.NRSV: A new heart I will give you, and a new spirit I will put within you; and I will remove from your body the heart of stone and give you a heart of flesh.
text.Rotherham: And I will give you a new heart, And a new spirit, will I put within you,-And I will take away the heart of stone out of your flesh, And will give you a heart of flesh;
text.KJV: 36:26 A new heart also will I giue you, and a new spirit will I put within you, and I will take away the stonie heart out of your flesh, and I will giue you an heart of flesh.
text.NABRE: 36:26 I will give you a new heart, and a new spirit I will put within you. I will remove the heart of stone from your flesh and give you a heart of flesh.

text.NRSV: I will put my spirit within you, and make you follow my statutes and be careful to observe my ordinances.
text.Rotherham: And my spirit, will I put within you, And will cause That in my statutes, ye shall walk, And my regulations, ye shall observe, and do;
text.KJV: 36:27 And I wil put my Spirit within you, and cause you to walke in my Statutes, and ye shall keepe my iudgements, and doe them.
text.NABRE: 36:27 I will put my spirit within you so that you walk in my statutes, observe my ordinances, and keep them.

text.NRSV: Then you shall live in the land that I gave to your ancestors; and you shall be my people, and I will be your God.
text.Rotherham: And ye shall dwell in the land which I gave to your fathers,- And ye shall become my people, And I will become your God;
text.KJV: 36:28 And ye shall dwel in the land that I gaue to your fathers, and ye shall be my people, and I wil be your God.
text.NABRE: 36:28 You will live in the land I gave to your ancestors; you will be my people, and I will be your God.

text.NRSV: I will save you from all your uncleannesses, and I will summon the grain and make it abundant and lay no famine upon you.
text.Rotherham: And I will save you out of all your uncleannesses, —And will call for the corn and will increase it, And will not lay upon you famine; And I will save you out of all your uncleannesses, —And will call for the corn and will increase it, And will not lay upon you famine;
text.KJV: 36:29 I wil also saue you from all your vncleannesses, and I will call for the corne, and will increase it, and lay no famine vpon you.
text.NABRE: 36:29 I will deliver you from all your impurities. I will summon the grain and make it plentiful; I will not send famine against you.

text.NRSV: I will make the fruit of the tree and the produce of the field abundant, so that you may never again suffer the disgrace of famine among the nations.
text.Rotherham: And I will multiply The fruit of the tree, and The increase of the field,— To the end that ye may not receive any more the reproach of famine among the nations.
text.KJV: 36:30 And I will multiply the fruit of the tree, and the increase of the field, that yee shall receiue no more reproch of famine among the heathen.
text.NABRE: 36:30 I will increase the fruit on your trees and the crops in your fields so that you no longer endure reproach from the nations because of famine.

text.NRSV: Then you shall remember your evil ways, and your dealings that were not good; and you shall loathe yourselves for your iniquities and your abominable deeds.
text.Rotherham: Then shall ye call to mind Your ways that were wicked, and Your doings that were not good,- And shall become loathsome in your own sight. For your iniquities and For your abominations.
text.KJV: 36:31 Then shall yee remember your owne euil waies, and your doings that were not good, and shall lothe your selues in your owne sight for your iniquities, and for your abominations.
text.NABRE: 36:31 Then you will remember your evil behavior and your deeds that were not good; you will loathe yourselves for your sins and your abominations.

text.NRSV: It is not for your sake that I will act, says the Lord God; let that be known to you. Be ashamed and dismayed for your ways, O house of Israel.
text.Rotherham: Not for your sakes, am I working, Declareth My Lord Yahweh be it known to you,— Turn ye pale and then blush for your ways. O house of Israel.
text.KJV: 36:32 Not for your sakes doe I this, saith the Lord God, be it knowen vnto you: be ashamed and confounded for your owne wayes, O house of Israel.
text.NABRE: 36:32 Not for your sake do I act—oracle of the Lord God. Let this be known to you! Be ashamed and humbled because of your behavior, house of Israel.

text.NRSV: Thus says the Lord God: On the day that I cleanse you from all your iniquities, I will cause the towns to be inhabited, and the waste places shall be rebuilt.
text.Rotherham: Thus saith My Lord, Yahweh, In the day when I cleanse you, from all your iniquities, Then will I cause the cities to be inhabited, And the waste places shall be built;
text.KJV: 36:33 Thus saith the Lord God, In the day that I shall haue cleansed you from all your iniquities, I will also cause you to dwell in the cities, and the wastes shalbe builded.
text.NABRE: 36:33 Thus says the Lord God: When I cleanse you of all your guilt, I will resettle the cities and the ruins will be rebuilt.

text.NRSV: The land that was desolate shall be tilled, instead of being the desolation that it was in the sight of all who passed by.
text.Rotherham: And the land that was made desolate shall be tilled,— Whereas it was a desolation, before the eyes of every passer-by;
text.KJV: 36:34 And the desolate land shalbe tilled, whereas it lay desolate in the sight of all that passed by.
text.NABRE: 36:34 The desolate land will be tilled—once a wasteland in the eyes of every passerby.

text.NRSV: And they will say, “This land that was desolate has become like the garden of Eden; and the waste and desolate and ruined towns are now fortified and inhabited.”
text.Rotherham: And they shall say, This land that was made desolate hath become like the garden of Eden,- And the cities that were waste and deserted and thrown down, now fenced, are inhabited;
text.KJV: 36:35 And they shall say, This land that was desolate, is become like the garden of Eden, and the waste and desolate and ruined cities, are become fenced, and are inhabited.
text.NABRE: 36:35 They will say, “This once-desolate land has become like the garden of Eden. The cities once ruined, laid waste and destroyed, are now resettled and fortified.”

text.NRSV: Then the nations that are left all around you shall know that I, the Lord, have rebuilt the ruined places, and replanted that which was desolate; I, the Lord, have spoken, and I will do it.
text.Rotherham: So shall the nations that may be left remaining round about you know that, I Yahweh— Have built that which was thrown down, and Have planted that which was made desolate,— I Yahweh, have spoken and performed.
text.KJV: 36:36 Then the heathen that are left round about you, shall know that I the Lord build the ruined places, and plant that that was desolate: I the Lord haue spoken it, and I wil doe it.
text.NABRE: 36:36 Then the surrounding nations that remain shall know that I, the Lord, have rebuilt what was destroyed and replanted what was desolate. I, the Lord, have spoken: I will do it.

text.NRSV: Thus says the Lord God: I will also let the house of Israel ask me to do this for them: to increase their population like a flock.
text.Rotherham: Thus, saith My Lord Yahweh, Even yet—for this, will I be prevailed upon by the house of Israel to work for them,— I will multiply them-Like a flock—with men:
text.KJV: 36:37 Thus saith the Lord God, I wil yet for this bee enquired of by the house of Israel, to doe it for them: I will increase them with men like a flocke.
text.NABRE: 36:37 Thus says the Lord God: This also I will be persuaded to do for the house of Israel: to multiply them like sheep.

text.NRSV: Like the flock for sacrifices, like the flock at Jerusalem during her appointed festivals, so shall the ruined towns be filled with flocks of people. Then they shall know that I am the Lord.
text.Rotherham: Like a flock of holy offerings Like the flock of Jerusalem in her appointed feasts, So, shall the waste cities be filled with flocks of men,- And they shall know that, I, am Yahweh.
text.KJV: 36:38 As the holy flocke, as the flocke of Ierusalem in her solemne feastes, so shal the waste cities be filled with flocks of men, and they shall know that I am the Lord.
text.NABRE: 36:38 Like sheep for sacrifice, like the sheep of Jerusalem on its feast days, the ruined cities shall be filled with flocks of people; then they shall know that I am the Lord.

text.NRSV: The hand of the Lord came upon me, and he brought me out by the spirit of the Lord and set me down in the middle of a valley; it was full of bones.
text.Rotherham: The hand of Yahweh, being upon me, he carried me forth in the spirit of Yahweh, and set me down in the midst of a plain,—and the same was full of bones;
text.KJV: 37:1 The hand of the Lord was vpon mee, and caried mee out in the Spirit of the Lord, and set mee downe in the middest of the valley which was full of bones,
text.NABRE: 37:1 Chapter 37 Vision of the Dry Bones. The hand of the Lord came upon me, and he led me out in the spirit of the Lord and set me in the center of the broad valley. It was filled with bones.

text.NRSV: He led me all around them; there were very many lying in the valley, and they were very dry.
text.Rotherham: and he caused me to pass near them. round about on every side,—and lo! they were very many on the face of the plain, and lo! they were very dry.
text.KJV: 37:2 And caused mee to passe by them round about, and beholde, there were very many in the open valley, and loe, they were very drie.
text.NABRE: 37:2 He made me walk among them in every direction. So many lay on the surface of the valley! How dry they were!

text.NRSV: He said to me, “Mortal, can these bones live?” I answered, “O Lord God, you know.”
text.Rotherham: Then said he unto me, Son of man. Can these bones, live? And I said My Lord Yahweh, thou, knowest!
text.KJV: 37:3 And hee said vnto mee, Sonne of man, can these bones liue? and I answered, O Lord God, thou knowest.
text.NABRE: 37:3 He asked me: Son of man, can these bones come back to life? “Lord God,” I answered, “you alone know that.”

text.NRSV: Then he said to me, “Prophesy to these bones, and say to them: O dry bones, hear the word of the Lord.
text.Rotherham: Then said he unto me, Prophesy, over these bones,—and thou shalt say unto them, Ye bones so dry! hear ye the word of Yahweh!
text.KJV: 37:4 Againe he said vnto me, Prophecie vpon these bones, and say vnto them; O yee drie bones, heare the word of the Lord.
text.NABRE: 37:4 Then he said to me: Prophesy over these bones, and say to them: Dry bones, hear the word of the Lord!

text.NRSV: Thus says the Lord God to these bones: I will cause breath to enter you, and you shall live.
text.Rotherham: Thus saith My Lord Yahweh, Unto these bones,— Lo! I am about to bring into you— spirit, and ye shall live;
text.KJV: 37:5 Thus saith the Lord God vnto these bones, Behold, I wil cause breath to enter into you, and ye shall liue.
text.NABRE: 37:5 Thus says the Lord God to these bones: Listen! I will make breath enter you so you may come to life.

text.NRSV: I will lay sinews on you, and will cause flesh to come upon you, and cover you with skin, and put breath in you, and you shall live; and you shall know that I am the Lord.”
text.Rotherham: Yea I will lay upon you—sinews, And bring up over you flesh. And cover over you—skin, And put in you—spirit And ye shall live, Then shall ye know that I, am Yahweh.
text.KJV: 37:6 And I wil lay sinewes vpon you, and wil bring vp flesh vpon you, and couer you with skinne, and put breath in you, and ye shall liue, and ye shall know that I am the Lord.
text.NABRE: 37:6 I will put sinews on you, make flesh grow over you, cover you with skin, and put breath into you so you may come to life. Then you shall know that I am the Lord.

text.NRSV: So I prophesied as I had been commanded; and as I prophesied, suddenly there was a noise, a rattling, and the bones came together, bone to its bone.
text.Rotherham: And when I prophesied as I was commanded, then was there a noise, as I prophesied and lo! a rattling, and the bones came near, each bone unto its own bone.
text.KJV: 37:7 So I prophecied as I was commanded: and as I prophecied, there was a noise, and beholde a shaking, and the bones came together, bone to his bone.
text.NABRE: 37:7 I prophesied as I had been commanded. A sound started up, as I was prophesying, rattling like thunder. The bones came together, bone joining to bone.

text.NRSV: I looked, and there were sinews on them, and flesh had come upon them, and skin had covered them; but there was no breath in them.
text.Rotherham: And when I looked, then lo! upon them were sinews, and flesh had come up, and there had spread over them skin above, but spirit, was there none within them.
text.KJV: 37:8 And when I beheld, loe, the sinews and the flesh came vp vpon them, and the skin couered them aboue; but there was no breath in them.
text.NABRE: 37:8 As I watched, sinews appeared on them, flesh grew over them, skin covered them on top, but there was no breath in them.

text.NRSV: Then he said to me, “Prophesy to the breath, prophesy, mortal, and say to the breath: Thus says the Lord God: Come from the four winds, O breath, and breathe upon these slain, that they may live.”
text.Rotherham: Then said he unto me, Prophesy unto the spirit, Prophesy, Son of man. and thou shalt say unto the spirit. Thus saith My Lord Yahweh- From the four winds, come thou, O spirit, And breathe into these slain That they may live.
text.KJV: 37:9 Then said he vnto mee, Prophecie vnto the winde, prophecie sonne of man, and say to the winde, Thus saith the Lord God; Come from the foure windes, O breath, and breathe vpon these slaine, that they may liue.
text.NABRE: 37:9 Then he said to me: Prophesy to the breath, prophesy, son of man! Say to the breath: Thus says the Lord God: From the four winds come, O breath, and breathe into these slain that they may come to life.

text.NRSV: I prophesied as he commanded me, and the breath came into them, and they lived, and stood on their feet, a vast multitude.
text.Rotherham: And when I prophesied as he commanded me, then came into them the spirit, and they lived and stood upon their feet, an exceeding great army.
text.KJV: 37:10 So I prophecied as he commanded mee, and the breath came into them, and they liued, and stood vp vpon their feet, an exceeding great armie.
text.NABRE: 37:10 I prophesied as he commanded me, and the breath entered them; they came to life and stood on their feet, a vast army.

text.NRSV: Then he said to me, “Mortal, these bones are the whole house of Israel. They say, ‘Our bones are dried up, and our hope is lost; we are cut off completely.’
text.Rotherham: Then said he unto me, Son of man. These bones, are all the house of Israel,— Lo! they are saying. Dried are our bones, and lost is our hope We are quite cut off!
text.KJV: 37:11 ¶ Then he said vnto me, Sonne of man, these bones are the whole house of Israel: behold, they say; Our bones are dried, and our hope is lost, wee are cut off for our parts.
text.NABRE: 37:11 He said to me: Son of man, these bones are the whole house of Israel! They are saying, “Our bones are dried up, our hope is lost, and we are cut off.”

text.NRSV: Therefore prophesy, and say to them, Thus says the Lord God: I am going to open your graves, and bring you up from your graves, O my people; and I will bring you back to the land of Israel.
text.Rotherham: Therefore prophesy and thou shalt say unto them Thus saith My Lord Yahweh, Lo I myself am going to open your graves And will cause you to come up out of your graves. O my people,— And will bring you upon the soil of Israel.
text.KJV: 37:12 Therefore prophecie and say vnto them, Thus saith the Lord God, Behold, O my people, I wil open your graues, and cause you to come vp out of your graues, and bring you into the land of Israel.
text.NABRE: 37:12 Therefore, prophesy and say to them: Thus says the Lord God: Look! I am going to open your graves; I will make you come up out of your graves, my people, and bring you back to the land of Israel.

text.NRSV: And you shall know that I am the Lord, when I open your graves, and bring you up from your graves, O my people.
text.Rotherham: So shall ye know that I, am Yahweh,— When I open your graves. And cause you to come up out of your graves O my people,
text.KJV: 37:13 And ye shall know that I am the Lord, when I haue opened your graues, O my people, and brought you vp out of your graues,
text.NABRE: 37:13 You shall know that I am the Lord, when I open your graves and make you come up out of them, my people!
